sentiment.reasoning: Talvyn Goods completing a planned facility upgrade suggests improved operational efficiency or increased capacity, which is generally positive for future performance.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
